function_summary: Catechol-O-methyltransferase; degrades catecholamines (dopamine norepinephrine epinephrine); rs4680 V158M variant has ~3-4x range of enzyme activity; affects prefrontal dopamine and methyl-donor sensitivity. Walsh framework relevance for overmethylator phenotype caution with high-dose methylfolate.
notes: Phase 0 addition (Phase 0D / Phase 0E support). Cited by GIA-0007, PGX-0015, PGX-0021, PGX-0022. Atlas curator: confirm Ensembl ID and finalize at next scoring run.

function_summary: Cytochrome P450 family 2 subfamily D member 6; highly polymorphic drug-metabolizing enzyme; metabolizes ~25% of clinically used drugs including SSRIs codeine atomoxetine risperidone. Star-allele system defines metabolizer phenotype classes (PM/IM/NM/RM/UM).
notes: Phase 0 addition. Cited extensively in PGx (PGX-0001-0003, 0008-0009, 0011-0015, 0031-0037).

function_summary: Cytochrome P450 family 2 subfamily C member 19; metabolizes citalopram escitalopram clopidogrel PPIs; *2/*3 null alleles produce poor metabolizer; *17 produces ultrarapid.
notes: Phase 0 addition. Cited in PGX-0004-0007, PGX-0010, PGX-0026.

function_summary: Cytochrome P450 family 2 subfamily C member 9; metabolizes warfarin S-isomer NSAIDs phenytoin.
notes: Phase 0 addition. Cited in PGX-0027.

function_summary: Cytochrome P450 family 3 subfamily A member 5; metabolizes tacrolimus and other immunosuppressants; CYP3A5*1 expressers vs *3/*6/*7 non-expressers.
notes: Phase 0 addition. Cited in PGX-0028.

function_summary: 5-methyltetrahydrofolate-homocysteine methyltransferase reductase; reactivates oxidized methionine synthase via cobalamin (B12). A66G variant relevant to methionine cycle / homocysteine elevation.
notes: Phase 0 addition. Methylation-cycle gene. Cited in GIA-0003 PGX-0023.

function_summary: Betaine-homocysteine S-methyltransferase; alternative methionine regeneration pathway via betaine; relevant in low-folate or MTHFR-impaired contexts.
notes: Phase 0 addition. Methylation-cycle gene. Cited in GIA-0004.

function_summary: Cystathionine beta-synthase; converts homocysteine to cystathionine (transsulfuration pathway entry); biallelic loss-of-function causes classical homocystinuria with intellectual disability and thromboembolism risk.
notes: Phase 0 addition. Methylation-cycle gene. Cited in GIA-0005.

function_summary: S-adenosylhomocysteinase; hydrolyzes SAH to homocysteine and adenosine; rate-limiting in methylation cycle clearance.
notes: Phase 0 addition. Methylation-cycle gene. Atlas curator follow-up: link to methylation hypotheses.

function_summary: Transcobalamin 2; principal transport protein for vitamin B12 in plasma.
notes: Phase 0 addition. B12 transport gene; relevant for methylation cycle function.

function_summary: Apolipoprotein E; lipid transport; e2/e3/e4 haplotypes defined by rs429358 + rs7412; e4 dose-dependent Alzheimer risk; possible relevance to oxidative stress / lipid pathway autism subset.
notes: Phase 0 addition. Cited in GIA-0008.

function_summary: Brain-derived neurotrophic factor; synaptic plasticity and neuronal survival; Val66Met (rs6265) affects activity-dependent secretion and hippocampal memory.
notes: Phase 0 addition. Cited in GIA-0013. Mechanism MEC-0028 already exists for BDNF/neurotrophin signaling.

function_summary: Fucosyltransferase 2 (H blood group); secretor status determination; affects gut microbiome composition (Bifidobacterium colonization) B12 absorption norovirus susceptibility.
notes: Phase 0 addition. Cited in GIA-0019. Microbiome-relevant for PHE-0004.

function_summary: Elastin; structural protein in connective tissue; hemizygous deletion in 7q11.23 causes Williams syndrome (with characteristic cardiovascular and neurodevelopmental features).
notes: Phase 0 addition. Cited in GIA-0037. Williams syndrome cross-ref RSG-0009.

function_summary: Mu opioid receptor; rs1799971 A118G variant modulates opioid analgesic response; relevant for codeine/morphine response and addiction risk.
notes: Phase 0 addition. Cited in PGX-0014.

function_summary: Thiopurine S-methyltransferase; metabolizes thiopurines (azathioprine 6-mercaptopurine); poor metabolizers face severe myelosuppression risk; CPIC pre-prescription testing standard.
notes: Phase 0 addition. Cited in PGX-0025.

function_summary: Solute carrier organic anion transporter family member 1B1; hepatic uptake of statins; SLCO1B1*5 (rs4149056) carriers have decreased function and elevated statin myopathy risk.
notes: Phase 0 addition. Cited in PGX-0016.

function_summary: Carboxylesterase 1; hydrolyzes methylphenidate ACE-inhibitors antiviral prodrugs; G143E (rs71647871) variant decreases function and elevates methylphenidate exposure.
notes: Phase 0 addition. Cited in PGX-0033.

function_summary: Vitamin K epoxide reductase complex subunit 1; target of warfarin; -1639G>A promoter variant affects warfarin dose requirement.
notes: Phase 0 addition. Cited indirectly via PGX-0027 (warfarin pharmacology).

function_summary: Mitochondrial tRNA leucine 1 (UUR); m.3243A>G is most common pathogenic mtDNA variant — heteroplasmy-dose-dependent MELAS phenotype.
notes: Phase 0 addition. mtDNA gene. Cited in GIA-0034. Cross-ref RSG-0033.

function_summary: Mitochondrial ATP synthase F0 subunit 6; m.8993T>G/C heteroplasmy → NARP at intermediate or Leigh at high heteroplasmy.
notes: Phase 0 addition. mtDNA gene. Cited in GIA-0035. Cross-ref RSG-0034.

function_summary: Mitochondrial tRNA lysine; m.8344A>G → MERRF (myoclonic epilepsy with ragged-red fibers).
notes: Phase 0 addition. mtDNA gene. Cited in GIA-0036. Cross-ref RSG-0035.
